zh.Thingdon, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾分頓
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke是John Greystoke和Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers的女兒，於1415年出生在英國諾圖波藍德。她於1434年與Roger Thornton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1440年在英國越可爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.Thingdon, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾分頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke是John Greystoke和Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers的女儿，于1415年出生在英国諾圖波藍德。她于1434年与Roger Thornton在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1440年在英国越可爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke was born in 1415, in Northumberland, England as the daughter of John Greystoke and Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. She married Roger Thornton in 1434, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1440, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke est née en 1415, à Northumberland, Angleterre, fille de John Greystoke et Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Elle a épousé Roger Thornton en 1434, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1440, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke wurde 1415 in Northumberland, England, als Tochter von John Greystoke und Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers geboren. Sie hat 1434 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1440 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke è nata il nel 1415 nel Northumberland, England come figlia di John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Lei sposato Roger Thornton nel 1434, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1440, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.Thingdon, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアフィンエドン
ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.Owesley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystokeは1415年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでJohn GreystokeとLady Elizabeth de Ferrersの娘として生まれた。1434年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRoger Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1440年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke(은)는 1415년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 John Greystoke(와)과 Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Roger Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 영국 요르크실르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke nasceu em 1415, em Northumberland, Inglaterra filha de John Greystoke e Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Ela casou-se com Roger Thornton em 1434, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke родилась в 1415 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. Её родителей звали John Greystoke и Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Thornton в 1434 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1440 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke nació en 1415, en Northumberland, Inglaterra como hija de John Greystoke y Lady Elizabeth de Ferrers. Se casó con Roger Thornton en 1434, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1440, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
